data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. BETTER TIME is a three-year-old filly from the Brett Gray stable on debut. Sure to enjoy an economical run from this draw. Was not far away in a recent trial. Will be right there at the business end. 7. CARBONATE is a three-year-old filly from the Matthew Williamson stable on debut. Will need a bit of luck negotiating a very wide starting position. Has strong trial form coming into this. Likely to attract plenty of interest from punters. 1. SCHEMEANDREAM finished 9 metres back in fourth over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway recently at her first race start. Strips fitter and can improve. 6. SHONAGH KIRK is in the mix if she can recapture the form from two starts back that saw her finish third over 1609m at this track.","runners":[3,7,1,6],"exclusive":false}
